title: Storybook Component Meta (CSF Default Export)
description: Schema for the default export in a Storybook CSF story file. The meta object defines the component being documented and shared configuration applied to all stories in the file.

title.description: Sidebar path and story name. Use '/' for grouping, e.g. 'Components/Button'. Optional when using auto-title feature.

component.description: The component being documented. Enables automatic argTypes extraction.

tags.description: Tags applied to all stories in this file. Use 'autodocs' to auto-generate docs page.

args.description: Default argument values shared by all stories in this file

argTypes.description: ArgType definitions overriding inferred types. Controls how args appear in the Storybook Controls panel.

parameters.description: Shared parameters applied to all stories in this file

decorators.description: Decorator functions applied to all stories in this file

loaders.description: Data loading functions applied to all stories

excludeStories.description: Named exports to exclude from Storybook story listings

includeStories.description: Named exports to include as stories (when you want to exclude non-story exports)

ArgType.description: ArgType definition controlling how a prop appears in the Controls panel

control.description: Control input type for the Controls panel

options.description: List of valid values for enum props (select, radio, check controls)
